title: Modernization and Transformation
description: The Modernization and Transformation program focuses on the fundamental restructuring and optimization of Army institutions to meet future challenges.
text:
Effective Army transformations for an era of strategic competition, fiscal constraint, and technological advancement
The Modernization and Transformation program focuses on the fundamental restructuring and optimization of Army institutions to meet future challenges.
It addresses the critical question of how the Army must transform its organization—people, processes, industrial partnerships, force structure, and resource allocation—to remain effective in an era of strategic competition, fiscal constraint, and technological advancements.
